summary: Iteration 25 - P&L Bug Fix and AI Features VERIFIED. All 15 backend tests passed. Today's P&L now shows non-zero unrealized P&L (-₹2 to -₹6) when open trades exist. AI Brain tab, Technical Analysis tab, and v4.1.5 footer all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix confirmed: /api/trades/today now calculates unrealized P&L from open trades in PAPER mode (lines 121-131 in trading.js)
Today's P&L correctly shows -₹2 to -₹6 based on live price simulations - no longer stuck at ₹0
All 5 technical indicators (RSI, MACD, VWAP, EMA, SMA) now include signal and reason fields
AI Brain tab correctly fetches /api/ai/insights and /api/ai/heatmap endpoints
Technical Analysis tab uses demo data with Demo Data badge when no broker connected

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All tabs, components, and P&L display working)

seed_data_creation: 4 open paper trades exist with simulated price movements
context_for_next_testing_agent: P&L bug is fixed. Today's P&L in Risk Management panel now shows actual unrealized P&L from open trades. 4 open trades exist in PAPER mode. AI Brain and Technical Analysis tabs fully functional with demo data.

pnl_bug_fix.description: Today's P&L shows non-zero value (-₹2 to -₹6) when open trades exist

ai_heatmap.result: Returns sectors with time bucket data (BANKING, IT have signals)

technical_analysis.result: Returns RSI (54.88, NEUTRAL), MACD (6.55, BULLISH), VWAP (BEARISH), EMA (BULLISH), SMA (BULLISH)

frontend_risk_panel_pnl.test: Risk Management panel Today's P&L display
frontend_risk_panel_pnl.result: Shows -₹2 (updates to -₹6 with price changes) - not ₹0
